title: Battle of Metalorn (Clone Wars)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Battle of Metalorn}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Battle |prev= |conc=*[[Battle of Jabiim]] *[[Battle of Kabal (Clone Wars)|Battle of Kabal]] |next=*[[Battle of Cerea]] *[[Battle of Aargonar (Clone Wars)|Battle of Aargonar]] |image= |name=Battle of Metalorn |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] |date=c. [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]]''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}}''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' |place=[[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]] |result=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] victory |side1=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]] *[[Jedi Commander/Legends|Jedi Commander]] [[Bhat Jul]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1= |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Uh, ''Master Hett!'' I heard that you were on the front lines on Metalorn...''"
"''We took Metalorn well over a week ago.|[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]]|[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]]}} A '''battle''' occurred on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. ==The battle== {{Quote|Though we have had setbacks on vital worlds, we will avenge the defeats on Muunilinst and Metalorn, and strike back with renewed spirit.|[[Count/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku's]] [[Fete Day]] message |{{InsiderCite|72|CIS Shadowfeed Year's Start Fete Day Edition}}}} The [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] attempted to retake [[Metalorn/Legends|Metalorn]], but the Separatist forces were repulsed by elements of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] led by [[Darth Krayt|A'Sharad Hett]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Bhat Jul]].{{CSWECite|II|37|Hett, A'Sharad}} {{Battle-stub}} ==Appearances== *[[Republic 58|''Republic'' 58]] {{1stm}} *{{InsiderCite|72|CIS Shadowfeed Year's Start Fete Day Edition}} {{Imo}} *''[[Reversal of Fortune]]'' {{Imo}} ==Sources== *{{CSWECite|multiple}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Metalorn (Clone Wars), battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Metalorn]] [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]]
